changelog: New: Weekly calendar split view on RoutinesScreen — see your full week at a glance with Mon-Sun tiles showing each day's scheduled workout.
New: Redesigned nutrition widget with calorie ring (CircularProgress) alongside compact macro bars and water dot indicators.
New: Volume widget now shows a trend arrow comparing this week's total volume to last week.
New: Quick-add presets in nutrition modal — tap Chicken & Rice, Protein Shake, Avocado Toast, or Steak & Veg to fill macros instantly.
